title: Nursery Rhyme. CCLI. Charms.
content:
Hickup, snicup,
        Rise up, right up!
        Three drops in the cup
        Are good for the hiccup.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCLI. Charms." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
